narrative:
Washington Franklin township has 3,415 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
